kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When Enter Username
kw.msg: Multiple keywords with name 'Enter Username' found. Give the full name of the keyword you want to use: keywords.Enter Username main_page.Enter Username
kw.status: Multiple keywords with name 'Enter Username' found. Give the full name of the keyword you want to use: keywords.Enter Username main_page.Enter Username

kw.name: Then User Should Be On Secure Page
And Flash Message Should Contain Success
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Navigate to the login page, enter valid credentials and verify the user is redirected to the secure area with a success message.
test.status: Multiple keywords with name 'Enter Username' found. Give the full name of the keyword you want to use: keywords.Enter Username main_page.Enter Username

test.name: TC_002 — Login Failure With Incorrect Password

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When Enter Username
kw.msg: Multiple keywords with name 'Enter Username' found. Give the full name of the keyword you want to use: keywords.Enter Username main_page.Enter Username
kw.status: Multiple keywords with name 'Enter Username' found. Give the full name of the keyword you want to use: keywords.Enter Username main_page.Enter Username

kw.name: Then User Should Remain On Login Page
And Flash Message Should Contain Invalid Password Error
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Navigate to the login page, enter a wrong password and verify the user stays on the login page with an invalid password error.
test.status: Multiple keywords with name 'Enter Username' found. Give the full name of the keyword you want to use: keywords.Enter Username main_page.Enter Username

test.name: TC_003 — Login Failure With Incorrect Username

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: When Enter Username
kw.msg: Multiple keywords with name 'Enter Username' found. Give the full name of the keyword you want to use: keywords.Enter Username main_page.Enter Username
kw.status: Multiple keywords with name 'Enter Username' found. Give the full name of the keyword you want to use: keywords.Enter Username main_page.Enter Username

kw.name: Then User Should Remain On Login Page
And Flash Message Should Contain Invalid Username Error
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Navigate to the login page, enter a wrong username and verify the user stays on the login page with an invalid username error.
test.status: Multiple keywords with name 'Enter Username' found. Give the full name of the keyword you want to use: keywords.Enter Username main_page.Enter Username
